description: HAZZYS Korea buyer-specific trim rules. Loaded from Hazzys Brand Guidelines.

rules.name: DTM Sewing Thread
rules.description: All sewing thread must be DTM (Dye To Match) — color matched to main fabric

action.append_remark: Thread color to match main fabric — DTM per HAZZYS brand standard

rules.name: Matching Button Color
rules.description: All buttons must match the fabric/garment color — specify color code or DTM

action.append_remark: Button color to match garment — confirm with buyer before bulk production

rules.name: YKK Zipper Preferred
rules.description: HAZZYS prefers YKK brand zippers. Other brands require buyer approval.

action.append_remark: Preferred brand: YKK. Alternative brands require HAZZYS approval before ordering.

rules.name: Hazzys Brand Main Label
rules.description: Main label must carry HAZZYS brand name — woven label standard spec

action.append_remark: HAZZYS brand label — artwork and size to be confirmed with HAZZYS merchandiser

rules.name: Individual Polybag Required
rules.description: Each garment must be packed in individual polybag — no group packing

action.append_remark: Individual polybag — 1 pc per polybag. Biodegradable preferred.

rules.name: Hangtag with Barcode
rules.description: HAZZYS hangtag must include barcode and price tag — confirm format with buyer

action.append_remark: HAZZYS hangtag — must include barcode. Confirm format + data with HAZZYS before printing.

rules.name: Care Label Required
rules.description: Care/content label is mandatory for all garments per Korean consumer protection law

action.append_remark: Mandatory per Korean consumer protection law. Language: Korean + English.

rules.name: Size Label Standard
rules.description: Size label must follow HAZZYS standard sizing (44-110 Korean size system)

action.append_remark: Use HAZZYS standard Korean size system. Confirm size range with merchandiser.
